title: Stop Watching Tutorials - Build These 4 Claude Projects to 10x Output
summary: Austin Marchese argues that building real Claude projects is more valuable than watching tutorials. He outlines four practical projects: an AI Board of Advisors, a niche command center, an AI-optimized website, and an internal operating system, claiming these build competency faster and create output multipliers.
